tools.name: accountBalances.listAccountBalances
tools.description: Gets a list of balances for a bank account including end-of-day batch balance or running balances per transaction.

tools.name: accounts.getAccount
tools.description: Gets a specified bank account for a given company

tools.name: accounts.listAccounts
tools.description: Gets a list of all bank accounts of the SMB, with rich data like balances, account numbers and institutions holdingthe accounts.

tools.name: transactionCategories.getTransactionCategory
tools.description: Gets a specified bank transaction category for a given company

tools.name: transactionCategories.listTransactionCategories
tools.description: Gets a list of hierarchical categories associated with a transaction for greater contextual meaning to transactionactivity.

tools.name: transactions.getTransaction
tools.description: Gets a specified bank transaction for a given company

tools.name: transactions.listBankTransactions
tools.description: Gets a list of transactions incurred by a company across all bank accounts.

tools.name: transactions.listTransactions
tools.description: Gets a list of transactions incurred by a bank account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
